note: 算法候选经 Claude 盘前按新闻/信心筛选。仅供学习/研究参考,不构成投资建议或收益承诺。市场有风险,盈亏自负。
data_quality_flags: QQQ shows -4.42% in quotes.json which is inconsistent with SPY +0.4% and NVDA +1.6% — likely a bad prev_close; ignored (regime guard uses SPY).
conviction_note: 1 name (NVDA), moderate conviction, into a cautious tape. Today's story: futures down ~0.4%, GOOGL -4% / TSLA -7% on AI-capex 'profitability' fears, cooling jobs (ADP), 10y ~4.63%. But the worry hits the SPENDERS; NVDA (the chip SELLER) shows relative strength premarket (+1.6%). Dropped AMD (+11%/3d = chased, no-chase blocks) and JPM (+5% pop, catalyst unconfirmed = chasing an unexplained gap). Energy still ripping but way overextended and OXY is benched (exited yesterday). 1 slice, tight stop given the risk-off lean.

reasoning.en: NVDA relative strength (+1.6% premarket) while AI-capex profitability fears hit the SPENDERS (GOOGL -4%, TSLA -7%) — the market differentiates: NVDA sells the chips that capex buys, and Asian chipmakers rallied on the AI buildout. Clean 3d +4.6% (not extended), 5d flat = consolidation, not a blow-off. Risk: on a broad AI-scare day correlations spike and NVDA could get dragged down regardless — hence 1 slice only + a tight 2.5% stop.
reasoning.zh: NVDA 相对强势(盘前 +1.6%),而 AI 资本开支的盈利担忧打的是'花钱方'(GOOGL -4%、TSLA -7%)—— 市场在区分:NVDA 是卖芯片的,别人担忧的资本开支正是它的收入,亚洲芯片股也因 AI 建设走强。三日 +4.6%(未过热),五日走平=盘整非顶背离。风险:若全大盘 AI 恐慌,相关性升高 NVDA 也可能被拖下水——所以只做 1 份 + 2.5% 紧止损。
